untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) diverging trend lines forming a broadening wedge pattern, (2) price touching top trend line specifically, (3) directional price reversal from decline to uptrend without touching lower trend line. These are geometric pattern recognition requirements that cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicator values and basic operators. Trend line slopes, convergence/divergence detection, and relative position between dual dynamic lines are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation uses Donchian upper band as proxy for top resistance and volume confirmation, with breakout exit logic. However, this does NOT capture the wedge geometry, the dual trend line relationship, or the specific price action sequence required by the pattern. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection logic outside standard technical indicators.
